## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Research/cryptanalysis
- [ ] API feature
- [ ] Performance/benchmarking

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass with `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] No claim of certified production cryptography added
- [ ] New parameters are marked research-only unless independently reviewed
